title: Orioles vs Red Sox: Teams Set to Make History on Monday Night
description: According to Yahoo Sports and NESN, the Boston Red Sox and Baltimore Orioles are set to make history on Monday night, while MLB.com notes the Orioles are a surging team to watch.

sources.title: Why surging Orioles are the most interesting team to watch right now
Boston Red Sox and Baltimore Orioles Set to Make History on Monday Night
Red Sox Join 1884 St. Louis Maroons in Astounding MLB History

sections.heading: Historic Monday Night Matchup
paragraphs: The Boston Red Sox and Baltimore Orioles are scheduled to play on Monday night in a game that is set to make history according to Yahoo Sports. NESN reports that the Red Sox are joining the 1884 St. Louis Maroons in what is described as astounding MLB history.

sections.heading: Orioles' Recent Performance
paragraphs: MLB.com has identified the Orioles as a surging team. The source states that the Orioles are currently the most interesting team to watch right now.

sections.heading: Search Interest
paragraphs: The matchup has generated significant interest online. The search term 'orioles vs red sox' has a reported lower bound of 10,000 searches in the US region.

faq.q: Why are the Red Sox and Orioles making history?
faq.a: According to NESN, the Red Sox are joining the 1884 St. Louis Maroons in astounding MLB history during their Monday night game against the Orioles.

faq.q: How are the Orioles performing recently?
faq.a: MLB.com describes the Orioles as a surging team and calls them the most interesting team to watch right now.
